items.title: Salesforce rolls out new Slackbot AI agent as it battles Microsoft and Google in workplace AI
items.description: Salesforce on Tuesday launched an entirely rebuilt version of Slackbot, the company s workplace assistant, transforming it from a simple notification tool into what executives describe as a fully powered AI agent capable of searching enterprise data,

items.title: De-fi platform Drift suspends deposits and withdrawals after millions in crypto stolen in hack
items.description: Blockchain trackers put the cryptocurrency heist in the hundreds of millions of dollars and is already on track to be the largest crypto theft in 2026 so far.

items.title: Anthropic took down thousands of GitHub repos trying to yank its leaked source code — a move the company says was an accident
items.description: Anthropic executives said it was an accident and retracted the bulk of the takedown notices.

items.title: The reputation of troubled YC startup Delve has gotten even worse
items.description: Delve faces new allegations that it violated the open source license of its customer, Sim.ai, by taking the customers's tool and passing it off as its own.

items.title: ‘System failure’ paralyzes Baidu robotaxis in China
items.description: Passengers in Baidu's robotaxis were trapped for up to two hours.

items.title: A new dating app, Sonder, has a deliberately annoying sign-up process (and it’s working)
items.description: Sonder profiles are completely unstructured, encouraging users to build something that looks like a mood board or a digital collage. Think MySpace rather than LinkedIn.

items.title: Startup funding shatters all records in Q1
items.description: The record quarterly fundraise largely fueled four mega-deals into OpenAI, Anthropic, xAI, and Waymo. But it also indicates a generally hot market.

items.title: Apple releases security fix for older iPhones and iPads to protect against DarkSword attacks
items.description: The security update protects a raft of older iPhones and iPads from attacks linked to leaked hacking tools called DarkSword.

items.title: Meta’s natural gas binge could power South Dakota
items.description: Meta's upcoming Hyperion AI data center will be powered by 10 new natural gas plants.

items.title: Cameo partners with TikTok to boost popularity
items.description: Cameo launched a new TikTok integration that allows U.S. creators to offer personalized videos through the app.

items.title: WhatsApp notifies hundreds of users who installed a fake app made by government spyware maker
items.description: The Meta-owned company said it identified around 200 users who were tricked into installing a fake version of WhatsApp that was actually Italian-made spyware.

items.title: Cognichip wants AI to design the chips that power AI, and just raised $60M to try
items.description: The firm says it can reduce the cost of chip development by more than 75% and cut the timeline by more than half.

items.title: SpaceX files confidentially for IPO in mega listing potentially valued at $1.75 trillion, report says
items.description: The company has also lined up an unusually large number of 21 banks to manage the mega IPO, internally codenamed “Project Apex."

items.title: Hasbro says it was hacked, and may take ‘several weeks’ to recover
items.description: The American toy-making giant noted that it was continuing to "implement measures to secure its business operations," suggesting that the hackers may still be in the company's systems.

items.title: Less than a month: StrictlyVC San Francisco brings leaders from TDK Ventures, Replit, and more together
items.description: StrictlyVC San Francisco brings leaders from TDK Ventures, Replit, and more together on April 30. Space is limited. Register here for your pass.

items.title: Lucid Motors recalls over 4,000 Gravity SUVs citing improperly welded seat belts
items.description: The company struggled with quality issues when Gravity production started last year, and the new recall shows it's not out of the woods yet.
